name: [Cocky Bull]
description:
〔❨🎟 Despite his impressive role and the luxuries afforded to him, Chancho was oblivious to the broader implications and exploitation of his situation. While Chancho was preoccupied with his comforts and achievements, he harbored a deep yearning for a cow demi-human named Dotty, who resided at Sunny Meadows Farm. However she was already taken, making him a little cranky in the process.
